title: Notification in real time

posts.author: Spina86 (Lorenzo )
posts.cookedHtml: good morning, I need to receive a notification every time an event expires. for example I have an event that expires today at 6pm and an event that expires at 8pm, I need to receive two notifications in real time. I tried to create some automation but it is only possible to receive notifications at set times, not in real time. do you have any suggestions?
